failed_attempts:
by
  simp only []
  have hj_lt := getElem_flatten_aux₁ L i h
  have hfi_lt : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums < (map length L).partialSums.length := by
    apply findIdx_lt_length_of_exists
    exact ⟨L.flatten.length, length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length L, by
      simp only [decide_eq_true_eq, gt_iff_lt]; exact h⟩
  have hfi_pos : 0 < findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums := by
    by_contra w
    simp only [Nat.not_lt, Nat.le_zero] at w
    have h1 := findIdx_getElem (p := fun x => decide (x > i)) (xs := (map length L).partialSums) (w := hfi_lt)
    simp only [w, getElem_partialSums, decide_eq_true_eq, gt_iff_lt, take_zero, sum_nil] at h1
    omega
  have h_le : (take (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums - 1) L).flatten.length ≤ i := by
    have h1 := not_of_lt_findIdx (p := fun x => decide (x > i))
      (xs := (map length L).partialSums)
      (i := findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums - 1)
      (by omega)
    simp only [decide_eq_false_iff_not, gt_iff_lt, Nat.not_lt, getElem_partialSums] at h1
    rw [length_flatten, map_take]; exact h1
  have h_gt : i < (take (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums) L).flatten.length := by
    have h1 := findIdx_getElem (p := fun x => decide (x > i))
      (xs := (map length L).partialSums)
      (w := hfi_lt)
    simp only [decide_eq_true_eq, gt_iff_lt, getElem_partialSums] at h1
    rw [length_flatten, map_take]; exact h1
  suffices h_split : (take (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums) L).flatten.length =
      (take (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums - 1) L).flatten.length +
      L[findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums - 1].length by omega
  have take_succ_len : ∀ (M : List (List α)) (n : Nat) (hn : n < M.length),
      (take (n + 1) M).flatten.length = (take n M).flatten.length + M[n].length := by
    intro M n hn
    induction M generalizing n with
    | nil => simp at hn
    | cons l M ih =>
      cases n with
      | zero => simp
      | succ n =>
        simp only [take_succ_cons, flatten_cons, length_append, getElem_cons_succ]
        rw [ih n (by simp at hn; omega)]
        omega
  calc (take (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums) L).flatten.length
      = (take ((findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums - 1) + 1) L).flatten.length := by
          rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel hfi_pos]
    _ = _ := take_succ_len L _ hj_lt
